pause.title: Paused
dialogue.hello.speaker: Sage
dialogue.hello.line0: Greetings, wanderer. Your empire has stirred the old tales — and not all who hear them are friends.
dialogue.hello.line1: Will you heed a warning before your walls rise too high?
dialogue.hello.line_yes: Then listen: when the moon rises, the dead rise with it. Lock your gates before dusk.
dialogue.hello.line_no: Proud, then. We shall see if your stones can hold what's coming.
dialogue.welcome.line0: The realm is ours to shape. The first grant of land is yours.
dialogue.welcome.line1: Build wisely, king. Not every lord survives the first winter.
dialogue.first_contact.bandit.line0: A bandit stalks your borders. They've come for what your people build.
dialogue.first_contact.bandit.line1: Post archers or raise a barracks — clubs are answered with arrows.
dialogue.first_contact.zombie.line0: The dead walk. You've felt it in the wind since the last sundown.
dialogue.first_contact.zombie.line1: They shamble, but they do not tire. Keep your gates — and your fires — lit.
dialogue.lost_goblins.speaker: Lost Goblin
dialogue.lost_goblins.line0: King — a band of us got cut off from our tribe in the storm. We've nowhere to return to.
dialogue.lost_goblins.line1: Take us in and we'll work for our keep. Refuse, and we'll move on before sundown.
dialogue.lost_goblins.choice_accept: You may join. The realm has need of hands.
dialogue.lost_goblins.choice_refuse: Move on. I cannot feed every wandering soul.
dialogue.lost_goblins.line_accept: We'll not forget this kindness, King. We'll find your gates by morning.
dialogue.lost_goblins.line_refuse: Then we walk. May the next king have a fuller larder.
dialogue.raider_swarm.speaker: Scout
dialogue.raider_swarm.line0: Riders at the edge of your fields, King. Painted shields, drawn blades — raiders.
dialogue.raider_swarm.line1: They mean to swarm the gates before nightfall. Rally what guards you can.
toast.event.lost_goblins: A band of lost goblins approaches the gates...
toast.event.wandering_hero: A wandering hero arrives at the Capital.
toast.event.merchant_arrives: A merchant caravan rolls up to the gates.
toast.event.merchant_passes: A merchant caravan passes by — too poor to trade.
toast.event.merchant_no_funds: The merchant scoffs — your stores have run dry.
toast.event.falling_star: A falling star strikes the wilderness — something stirs.
toast.event.bountiful_harvest: Granaries swell — the season has been kind.
toast.event.earthquake: The ground splits — buildings have taken damage!
toast.event.treasure_cache: Rumor of an abandoned cache reaches the throne.
toast.event.sage_blessing: A sage's blessing washes over your people — wounds mend.
toast.event.goblin_cave: A goblin cave has been spotted at the edge of your lands!
toast.event.lost_caravan: A lost caravan's wreckage has been spotted in the wilderness.
toast.event.stranger_arrives: A stranger in dark robes approaches the throne...
toast.event.stranger_gold: The stranger fills your coffers and vanishes.
toast.event.stranger_blessing: A blessing washes over your people — wounds close.
toast.event.stranger_refuse: The stranger nods once and slips away.
toast.event.plague: A plague sweeps through the realm — your people fall ill!
toast.event.crow_omen: Crows circle a building — restless dead claw at its walls!
toast.landmark.shrine_demolished: Restless dead rise from the desecrated shrine!
toast.landmark.tree_demolished: Tree felled — timber stocked in the Capital.
toast.landmark.vein_demolished: Vein cleared — stone delivered to the Capital.
toast.landmark.curse_demolished: A wraith claims payment in blood!
toast.event.goblin_village_hostile: A hostile goblin village rises at the edge of your lands!
toast.event.goblin_village_ally: A friendly goblin village settles within your reach.
dialogue.stranger.speaker: Hooded Stranger
dialogue.stranger.line0: King — I've walked far to reach your hall. The hour is late and my purse is heavy.
dialogue.stranger.line_offer: I offer you a choice: a purse of gold, a healing word for your wounded, or my blade — whichever the crown wills.
dialogue.stranger.choice_blessing: A blessing. My people are weary.
dialogue.stranger.line_gold: As you wish, King. The coin is yours.
dialogue.stranger.line_blessing: Then let healing find every battered hand under your banner.
dialogue.stranger.line_refuse: Wisdom, perhaps. Or pride. Either way, I depart.
dialogue.merchant.speaker: Caravan Master
dialogue.merchant.line0: King — my caravan rests at your gates. The roads have been kind to my carts; the kingdom less so to your stockpile.
dialogue.merchant.line_offer: I'll take 30 timber off your hands for 10 cut stone. A fair barter for both of us — yes?
dialogue.merchant.line_accept: A pleasure trading with the crown. Until next season, King.
dialogue.merchant.line_refuse: Then I'll find another lord with sharper sense. Farewell.
treasury.title: Treasury
toast.event.pirate_cove: A pirate cove rises on the coast — corsairs prowl the waters!
toast.city.too_close: Too close to an existing city.
toast.city.no_funds: Not enough resources to found a city.
toast.city.water: Cannot found a city on water.

settings.saves.heading: Save Slots
settings.saves.restore_ok: Slot restored. Reload the world to see changes.
settings.saves.empty: No saves yet — use the slot field above or autosave from the System tab.
title.load_empty: No save slots found. Start a Single Player game first to create one.
palette.title: Build
inspector.title: Inspector
inspector.tower_variant.watch_desc: Defense — strong arrow volley, mid territory.
inspector.tower_variant.beacon_desc: Hybrid — wider territory, light volley, +10 vision.
inspector.inn_variant.tavern_desc: Hospitality — heal on rest, coin trickle.
inspector.inn_variant.ale_house_desc: Brewing — drink quality up, lighter heal, festive aura.
inspector.furnace_variant.forge_desc: Steel — alloy recipes, faster smelt cadence.
inspector.furnace_variant.glassworks_des: Glass — sand + coal → glass + lens crafting.
inspector.outpost_variant.watchpost_desc: Defense — wider territory, scout reveal aura.
inspector.outpost_variant.beacon_desc: Vision — signal-fire reveal aura, lighter volley.
inspector.outpost_variant.gatepost_desc: Chokepoint — heavy volley, tighter territory ring.
inspector.barracks_variant.keep_desc: Garrison — tier-2 healing, mid sleep capacity.
inspector.barracks_variant.stables_desc: Cavalry — speed aura + cavalry recruit pipeline.
inspector.wall_variant.reinforced_desc: Stone — slight HP boost, projectile soak.
inspector.wall_variant.palisade_desc: Timber — cheap quick wall, lower HP.
